inputs.rowSource: motion-trace-alignment.csv rows joined to trace.csv by traceSequence

specs.TrainingTarget: event-safe target; post-stop and stationary labels pull to zero displacement
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, CPU compact search

specs.TrainingTarget: asymmetric future-lead penalty on manifest train split
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, lead penalty 8/event multiplier 2/lag 0.5

specs.TrainingTarget: event-safe target plus lead-projection hinge on stop-window rows
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, peakLead hinge cap 0.25 px on stop windows

specs.TrainingTarget: event-safe target plus returnMotion proxy penalty on stop/static rows
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, stop-window magnitude proxy and static suppression

specs.TrainingTarget: asymmetric lead loss only in event windows, normal-motion lag guard, and stationary jitter penalty
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, event lead hinge with lag guard >=0.65 px on normal moving rows

specs.TrainingTarget: stop-window safety target with capped displacement when recentHigh is high and current motion is near stop
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, differentiable cap proxy against nonzero stop output

candidate.TrainingTarget: event-safe target; post-stop and stationary labels pull to zero displacement
candidate.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, CPU compact search

candidate.TrainingTarget: asymmetric future-lead penalty on manifest train split
candidate.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, lead penalty 8/event multiplier 2/lag 0.5

candidate.TrainingTarget: event-safe target plus lead-projection hinge on stop-window rows
candidate.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, peakLead hinge cap 0.25 px on stop windows

candidate.TrainingTarget: event-safe target plus returnMotion proxy penalty on stop/static rows
candidate.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, stop-window magnitude proxy and static suppression

candidate.TrainingTarget: asymmetric lead loss only in event windows, normal-motion lag guard, and stationary jitter penalty
candidate.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, event lead hinge with lag guard >=0.65 px on normal moving rows

candidate.TrainingTarget: stop-window safety target with capped displacement when recentHigh is high and current motion is near stop
candidate.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, differentiable cap proxy against nonzero stop output

candidate.TrainingTarget: best step03 event-safe MLP with a post-model stop/static latch cap
candidate.RuntimeShape: event-safe MLP output capped to 0.35 px while recentHigh/low-v/near-stop latch is active

runtimeCost.guard: per-scenario stop latch, static zero target, cap, and lead-side clamp

candidate.TrainingTarget: asymmetric-lead MLP with stop-window lag/lead guard and cap
candidate.RuntimeShape: asymmetric MLP blended 50% toward current and capped to 0.45 px while stop latch is active

runtimeCost.guard: per-scenario stop latch, static zero target, cap, and lead-side clamp

candidate.RuntimeShape: current product DistilledMLP lag0 offset -4ms with post-stop brake
v20 rule: recentHigh>=400, v5<=300, latestDelta<=2.5; snap to current while latched
v20 rule: recentHigh>=400, v2<=150, latestDelta<=2.0; cap prediction magnitude to 0.5 px while latched

conclusionHints.conservativeGate: No candidate should be considered product-ready unless it improves balanced stop-event risk without degrading normal visual p95/p99 on the untouched normal test split.
